refined_caption: The hospital food on the plate appears to be contaminated with crumbs and other debris. The food does not look fresh or hygienically prepared.
complaint_description: I was served a meal in the hospital that was clearly contaminated with crumbs and other debris. The food looked old and unappetizing, and I was worried about getting sick from eating it. I expect a higher standard of food quality and hygiene in a hospital.
voice_text: I got a plate of food here in the hospital and it's got crumbs all over it, looks really unhygienic.
